REMOVED FROM MASTER SHORT CAUSE CALENDAR SET FOR APR-16-2007 - OFF CALENDAR. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT THIS MATTER HAD SETTLED. JUDGMENT SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: DAVID L. BALLATI, CLERK: D. LOK, REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, #4280 (D206)
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, SHORT CAUSE TRIAL SET FOR APR-16- 2007 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON FEB-09-2007 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORGAN GRAPHIC SUPPLY INC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOLZER AND HAIL INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $72,133.65 PRINCIPAL, $1,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $7,905.05 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $81,038.70, SEE SCANNED "JUDGMENT"
